name: Rainbow Bridge of Salvation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>救</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>すく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>いの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>架</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>け<ruby lang="jp"><rb>橋</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If there are 2 or more different Monster Types among the Level 10 or higher monsters on the field: Shuffle all cards except this one from both players' hands, fields, and GYs into the Deck, then each player draws 5 cards. You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Crystal Beast" monster and 1 Field Spell from your Deck to your hand. You can only apply each effect of "Rainbow Bridge of Salvation" once per Duel.
eff: If there are 2 or more different Monster Types among the Level 10 or higher monsters on the field: Shuffle all cards except this one from both players' hands, fields, and GYs into the Deck, then each player draws 5 cards. You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Crystal Beast" monster and 1 Field Spell from your Deck to your hand. You can only apply each effect of "Rainbow Bridge of Salvation" once per Duel.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
